CONTENT.Club career: Gendrey made his professional debut with Amiens in a 1–0 Ligue 2 win over AS Nancy on 22 August 2020.On 29 July 2021, he joined Lecce.
CONTENT.Personal life: Gendrey is of Guadeloupean descent and a distant cousin of the former French international footballer Olivier Dacourt.
CONTENT.External links: Valentin Gendrey at SoccerwayValentin Gendrey at the French Football Federation (in French)

SUMMARY: Valentin André Stanislas Gendrey (born 21 June 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Serie A club Lecce.
